title: Verdict
x-source-of-truth: gate internal/verify/verify.go (type Verdict) — the PROMOTED type; the reducer there is the behavioral source of truth. The workbench-redesign POC copy is ancestral and stale (string producer).
x-versioning-note: First versioned expression of the contract (pays the redesign RED-TEAM #7 unimportable/unversioned debt). Per the gate steward: this schema must be conformance-tested against gate's verify.Verdict and should graduate to live next to that type in gate — never maintained as an independent copy. v0.2.0: producer is a structured {class, impl} object. v0.3.0 (ci-classify design, gate PR #10): Finding gains an optional `evidence` field — the verbatim log line / diff span a finding quotes, the substrate the extract-shaped verifiers check; omitempty so existing rungs are unaffected.
description: The one artifact body every verifier emits — code, local-model, or judgment. Two orthogonal axes: `decision` (block > escalate > pass) is INDEPENDENT of `tier` (risk band). Composition is monotone (Reduce): worst decision wins, max tier wins, min confidence carries. Ladder law: a local-model producer may only pass or escalate — a `block` from it is a structural violation (ErrLocalBlock), which is what makes 'a local classifier never gates a merge' free.

subject.description: What the verdict is about. PR-shaped today; a CI verdict is really about a run but reuses the PR subject.

source.description: The verifier that produced this verdict, e.g. 'triage-floor', 'review-consolidation', 'ci-classify'.

producer.description: Who stands behind the verdict. Class carries the ladder semantics (the only values the reducer accepts); impl names the specific implementation for provenance only — nothing may branch on it.

tier.description: Risk band; unknown values rank highest (fail closed).
